name: techwerker
description: Unofficial local Codex helper for managing dense Tech Week calendars, signup queues, repeated RSVP form fields, and RSVP state.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Tech Week queues and RSVP form work
interface.longDescription: Unofficial local Codex helper for Tech Week attendees. It keeps persistent state under ~/.codex/data/tech-week, builds geography-aware oversignup portfolios, tracks RSVP state, stores non-secret form memory, and uses assisted browser filling while pausing before final submit by default. Not affiliated with Tech Week, a16z, Partiful, or event hosts.
defaultPrompt: Build my NY Tech Week portfolio
Work through my Techwerker RSVP queue
Make a Tech Week day plan from accepted events
